deletes.name: Conditional single (lowest salary)
deletes.instruction: Delete the employee with the lowest salary.

deletes.name: Nested condition (city)
deletes.instruction: Delete all employees whose address city is Paris.

deletes.name: Offboarding
deletes.instruction: You are an HR system administrator. Employee Eva Garcia (ID 3) has left the company effective immediately. Write a delete document to remove her record.

deletes.name: Department dissolution
deletes.instruction: The board has decided to dissolve the HR department and outsource all HR functions. Write a delete document to remove all HR department employees from the directory.

deletes.name: Compliance cleanup
deletes.instruction: GDPR audit: all employee records without a phone number must be flagged for deletion until contact data is provided. Write a delete document for these incomplete records.

deletes.name: Budget restructuring
deletes.instruction: Budget crisis: management decided to let go of all Junior-level employees. Write a delete document to remove them.

deletes.name: Project wind-down
deletes.instruction: The 'Atlas' project is being shut down. All employees who are exclusively assigned to Atlas (their only project) should be removed from the directory. Write the delete document.
